message:
Add null defaults for UDO field parameters

Enable user-defined operators to have field-type parameters with null as a
default value, allowing package authors to create operators with optional
field selector arguments. Field parameters can now default to null when not
provided by the caller, but cannot have any other default values.

Changes:
- package.cpp: Validate that field-type parameters only allow null defaults
- user_defined_operator.cpp: Handle null defaults during instantiation and
  validate explicitly provided field values
- Add 11 new test cases covering happy paths and error conditions

Resolves: #5748

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+---
+description: "Invalid non-null default for a field parameter"
+args:
+  named:
+    - name: field
+      type: field
+      default: this.input
+---
+set marker = "should not load"

@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+id: argspkg_field_default_failing
+name: Field Default Failing Package
+description: Package with invalid non-null field defaults.

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+description: "Mark whether an optional field argument was provided"
+args:
+  named:
+    - name: field
+      type: field
+      default: null
+      description: "Optional field selector"
+---
+set field_provided = $field != null

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+error: default value for field parameter `field` must be `null`

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+error: expected a selector
+ --> tests/packages/udo-args/udo-args-field-default-null-explicit-null-invalid.tql:6:41
+  |
+6 | argspkg::optional_field_indicator field=null
+  |                                         ^^^^ 
+  |
+  = usage: argspkg::optional_field_indicator [field=field]
+  = note: parameters:
+            named:
+              name   type   default  description
+              field  field  ~        Optional field selector
